title: Kabanos Stew
description: A hearty Brazilian-inspired stew made with kabanos sausage and tender vegetables.

ingredients.name: tropical fruit
ingredients.notes: diced and chopped (such as pineapple, mango, or papaya)

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the kabanos sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the pot and set aside.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the tropical fruit and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Return the kabanos sausage to the pot and reduce heat to low.
Simmer the stew for 1 1/2 hours or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
